data.acceptance:
1. Skill is registered and callable via the Skill tool with name 'refine-knot-scope'
2. Skill accepts {{title}}, {{description}}, and optional {{scope}} template variables
3. Skill output is valid JSON with exactly three fields: title, description, acceptance
4. Skill refines title: produces concise (≤72 char), clear titles
5. Skill rewrites description: improves clarity, removes ambiguity, adds specificity
6. Skill defines acceptance criteria: produces 3-5 testable, verifiable criteria; includes explicit emphasis on acceptance criteria importance
7. Skill preserves scope: does not broaden or add speculative requirements
8. Skill successfully processes a test input (e.g., an unfocused work item) and produces output that meets criteria 3-7
